theorem P2_implies_P3
    {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A := by
  open Set
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P3] at *
  intro x hxA
  have hxP2 : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    have hcl : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
      have hin : interior A ⊆ A := interior_subset
      exact closure_mono hin
    exact interior_mono hcl
  exact hsubset hxP2

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P3 (A := A) := by
  intro hA
  have hmono : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    have hclosure : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A :=
      closure_mono interior_subset
    exact interior_mono hclosure
  exact Set.Subset.trans hA hmono
